title: Semiconductor fabrication using process control parameter matrix
abstract: A method of processing substrates includes: subjecting each respective first substrate of a first plurality of substrates to a process that modifies a thickness of an outer layer of the respective first substrate; generating a plurality of groups of process parameter values, wherein the plurality of process parameters comprise a plurality of control parameters and a plurality of state parameters; generating a plurality of measured removal profiles; generating a matrix that relates the plurality of process parameters to a calculated removal profile; for each respective second substrate of a second plurality of substrates, determining a target removal profile and a plurality of state parameter values; calculating respective control parameter values to apply to the respective second substrate by applying the target removal profile and the state parameter values to the matrix; and subjecting each respective second substrate to the process using the respective process parameter values.
